title: Top Gun vs. TOPGUN: Part 1
text:

Top Gun vs. TOPGUN: Part 1
Sailor Pulse
Peter Cohn and Steve Walsh
June 27, 2026

Sign up now and start listening to "Sailor Pulse!"Already a member? Sign In to have access to our podcasts

Episode Notes:
Steve Walsh reconnects with fellow naval aviator Peter Cohn to hold the classic Top Gun films up against the school they both actually attended. In this first part of a two part conversation, they work through the early stretch of the experience: the reputation-driven scramble to get selected, the physical beating of back-to-back dogfights, and the long, windowless debriefs that define the real syllabus.
Image: William Lewis via DVIDS
